reason: Extreme Sentiment Detected (Score: 10/10): The report of a 17% reduction in Qatar's LNG capacity for five years due to military attacks represents a massive global supply shock. As Qatar is a leading global exporter, such a disruption would cause extreme panic and an explosive price surge in natural gas markets worldwide, including Henry Hub.

payload.summary: The report of a 17% reduction in Qatar's LNG capacity for five years due to military attacks represents a massive global supply shock. As Qatar is a leading global exporter, such a disruption would cause extreme panic and an explosive price surge in natural gas markets worldwide, including Henry Hub.
